name: trk/processwire-console
description: A professional CLI tool for ProcessWire CMS.

suggest.fakerphp/faker: Ideal for generating dummy data in database seeders.

post-install-cmd: php -r "if (!file_exists('../../wire')) { symlink('vendor/bin/wire', '../../wire'); echo 'Linked wire executable to project root.\n'; } else { echo 'wire executable already exists in project root.\n'; }"
